steps.title: Spot the contrast signaled by 'but'
steps.content: The word but marks a crucial turn: Sarah “undoubtedly accomplished much,” yet her place in our historical memory is “perhaps more _______ than that of a noteworthy 'first.'” This structure suggests that despite substantial achievements, her historical legacy might be fundamentally different from someone with clear, definitive accomplishments.

steps.title: Apply the clue
steps.content:
”Uncertain” directly fits this contrast: Sarah's place in historical memory would be more questionable or unclear.

The other three choices don't fit this meaning—they describe qualities that don't apply to the comparison structure the sentence requires.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
